title: Kobo Resources' completion of non-brokered private placement of units
content:
## Kobo Resources' completion of non-brokered private placement of units
On September 11, 2025, Kobo Resources Inc. (“Kobo”) completed the closing of the first tranche for gross proceeds of C$2,516,479.80 of its non-brokered private placement of units. On September 15, 2025, Kobo completed the subsequent closing of the second tranche for additional gross proceeds of C$1,444,875, for aggregate gross proceeds of C$3,961,354.80.
Kobo is a growth-focused gold exploration company with a compelling new gold discovery in Cote d’Ivoire, one of West Africa’s most prolific and developing gold districts, hosting several multi-million-ounce gold mines.
McCarthy Tétrault assisted Kobo with a team led by Charles-Antoine Soulière that included Charles Morin and Annie Poirier-Simard (Capital Markets).
